zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Throckmorton於1416年出生在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓時，她的父親Sir John de Throckmorton34歲，母親Lady Alianore de la Spine31歲。她於1438年與Thomas Wynslowe在英國奧可福爾布爾頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1463年在英國奧可福爾布爾頓享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Throckmorton于1416年出生在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓时，她的父亲Sir John de Throckmorton34岁，母亲Lady Alianore de la Spine31岁。她于1438年与Thomas Wynslowe在英国奧可福爾布爾頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1463年在英国奧可福爾布爾頓享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Throckmorton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Throckmorton in Worcestershire, which is named with Old English throc ‘beam bridge’ + mere ‘pool’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

History: The Throckmorton family was powerful and influential in England in Tudor times, but has since almost died out there. American bearers of the name trace their descent from either John Throckmorton (1601–1684) of New England or Robert Throckmorton (1609–1663) of VA.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Throckmorton was born in 1416, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, her father, Sir John de Throckmorton, was 34 and her mother, Lady Alianore de la Spine, was 31. She married Thomas Wynslowe in 1438, in Bourton, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 9 daughters. She died in 1463, in Bourton, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Throckmorton est née en 1416, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Throckmorton, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Lady Alianore de la Spine, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Wynslowe en 1438, à Bourton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée en 1463, à Bourton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Throckmorton 1416 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Throckmorton 34 und ihre Mutter Lady Alianore de la Spine 31. Sie hat 1438 in Bourton, Oxfordshire, England Thomas Wynslowe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb 1463 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Bourton, Oxfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Throckmorton è nata il nel 1416 nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Sir John de Throckmorton, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Lady Alianore de la Spine, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Wynslowe nel 1438, nel Bourton, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 9 figlie. Morì nel 1463, nel Bourton, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Throckmortonが1416年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンで生まれた時，父Sir John de Throckmortonは34歳，母Lady Alianore de la Spineは31歳であった。1438年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアボウルトンでThomas Wynsloweと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1463年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアボウルトンで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Throckmorton(이)가 1416년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Throckmorton(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alianore de la Spine(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1438년 영국 스퍼드실르 부르턴에서 Thomas Wynslowe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1463년 영국 스퍼드실르 부르턴에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Throckmorton nasceu em 1416, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Throckmorton, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alianore de la Spine, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Wynslowe em 1438, em Bourton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1463, em Bourton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Throckmorton родилась в 1416 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Throckmorton было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Alianore de la Spine, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Wynslowe в 1438 г. в местности буртон, оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Она умерла в 1463 г. в местности буртон, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Throckmorton nació en 1416, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Throckmorton, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Lady Alianore de la Spine, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Thomas Wynslowe en 1438, en Bourton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió en 1463, en Bourton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años.
